// Player-specific callback table (see PlayerCallbackTable in include/Game/entity.h).
// Installed on Player.collisionVtable while the player is alive; swapped to
// g_EntityVtable_Destroyed at death T+0 and restored at respawn T+2.

g_EntityVtable_ResourceType3 = 0x800103EC; // size:0x20
g_EntityVtable_ResourceType4 = 0x800103CC; // size:0x20
